arts.ttl: Giuntoli: ‘We restored Juventus, investing in young people while seeking financial balance’
arts.sum: Cristiano Giuntoli, Juventus’ sporting director, spoke to Sky Sport before the club’s Champions League debut against PSV Eindhoven, expressing his excitement about the occasion: “The Champions League? It’s a great emotion, though I’m no longer new to this competition. Returning after such a long time with Juventus is special.” Giuntoli then elaborated on the club’s recent financial strategy and progress: “We’ve just begun, we know it’s a process, and we’re happy with what we’ve accomplished so far. We’ve tried to rehabilitate a club that was losing a lot, putting it on the right path by investing in young players aged The post Giuntoli: ‘We restored Juventus, investing in young people while seeking financial balance’ appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Thiago Motta: ‘The attacking phase is not just Vlahovic’s job. That’s why McKennie plays’
arts.sum: Juventus head coach Thiago Motta shared his thoughts with Sky Sport before his team’s Champions League match against PSV Eindhoven. The Italian manager emphasized the importance of a collective approach and addressed key aspects of the team’s strategy. Motta began by highlighting the significance of the occasion, stating, “It’s a great football atmosphere to experience to the fullest. From now on, we must be serious and focused for every minute that passes. They like to play just as we do.” When asked about the increased level of competition in Europe, Motta responded, “Always, every match has its own story.
